name: Budimex SA
summary: Budimex SA operates as an infrastructure and services company in Poland. The company is involved in the general contracting of public, commercial, industrial, and residential buildings, as well as sports facilities. It also engages in the construction of hydraulic engineering projects, including shoreline armouring; construction and reinforcement of embankments and wharfs; and construction and reconstruction of drains and water bodies, and flood defenses, as well as road, railway, and airport infrastructure projects construction. In addition, the company is involved in the construction, modernization, and extension of wastewater treatment plants, water and sewer networks, and water treatment plants, as well as waste treatment, storage, and drying plants; and undertaking energy and industrial projects. Further, it provides earth works, mixtures distribution, routing the pavement, piling and lifting works, and professional flatbed transport; and laboratory, technological, and test services as well as offers bituminous mixtures. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Warsaw, Poland. Budimex SA is a subsidiary of Ferrovial, S.A.
